title: Domain-Validity-Gated Metamorphic Relation Identification and Executable Test Assets for Scientific Machine Learning
description: Replication package for the manuscript "Domain-Validity-Gated Metamorphic Relation Identification and Executable Test Assets for Scientific Machine Learning" (submitted to Information and Software Technology). Contains the domain-validity rubric, MR-card executable assets, the claim ledger binding every reported result to a tracked artifact, the MeshGraphNets cylinder-flow case study with committed run artifacts, cross-family PINN/FNO executions, the manuscript source (Elsevier elsarticle), the regression test suite and fail-closed validators, and three reproducibility tiers (smoke / cache-replay / full re-run) with a Dockerfile. See REPRODUCIBILITY.md.
